description: Truora provides digital identity verification, background checks, fraud/compliance tooling, and WhatsApp-based customer engagement for businesses, primarily in Latin America. Its products cover document and face validation, KYC/AML-related workflows, and customer communication automation.
summary: Truora exposes multiple authenticated HTTP APIs for background checks, digital identity/validators, and account token generation; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced.
